summary: Completed comprehensive testing of License Key System implementation. All backend license API endpoints (validate, activate, generate, my-license, deactivate) working correctly. Frontend license activation page shows appropriate 'Web Version' message for non-Electron. UpgradePage correctly displays LicenseKeyCard for Pro users.
passed_tests: POST /api/license/validate - returns valid=false for missing data
POST /api/license/validate - returns valid=false for invalid license key
POST /api/license/validate - returns valid=false for missing machine_id
POST /api/license/validate - returns valid=true for valid license with correct machine_id
POST /api/license/validate - returns machine_mismatch for different machine_id
POST /api/license/activate - returns 400 for missing required data
POST /api/license/activate - returns invalid_key error for non-existent key
POST /api/license/activate - normalizes license key to uppercase
POST /api/license/activate - returns already_activated when trying to activate on different machine
POST /api/license/generate - successfully generates/returns license for Pro users
GET /api/license/my-license - returns has_license=true with license details for Pro users
Frontend /activate - shows 'Web Version' message when not in Electron
Frontend /upgrade (Pro) - shows 'You're a Pro Member!' message and LicenseKeyCard
critical_code_review_comments: License key format uses OBSIDIAN-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX pattern - good unique identifiable format
License activation properly checks for machine_id mismatch before allowing activation on new device
License deactivation clears activated_machine_id allowing re-activation on different device
LicenseContext in frontend properly handles isElectron check for web vs desktop behavior
seed_data_creation: Created test Pro user with license key and Free user for testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: License Key System fully tested and working. Backend APIs handle all error cases correctly. Frontend properly distinguishes between Electron (desktop) and web browser. LicenseKeyCard component in UpgradePage shows license key with copy button for Pro users. Note: Cannot test actual Electron IPC in web environment, but API contracts are verified.
